title: IssuesJqlMetaDataBean
description: The description of the page of issues loaded by the provided JQL query.

count.description: The number of issues that were loaded in this evaluation.

maxResults.description: The maximum number of issues that could be loaded in this evaluation.

startAt.description: The index of the first issue.

totalCount.description: The total number of issues the JQL returned.

validationWarnings.description: Any warnings related to the JQL query. Present only if the validation mode was set to `warn`.
